race.comment: RIGHTEOUS LEGEND (3) finally broke the maiden status over this distance last time out and will have taken a bunch of confidence from that breakthrough victory. Should be able to sit up on speed from the favourable draw and is sure to give backers a sight. USE YOUR ILLUSION (1) will strip fitter third-up from the spell and the step-up in trip looks to suit. Should be right there at the business end. LOCH AWE (2) has hit the top-five at his past eight outings and is drawn to get a cosy run in transit from the inside marble. Top-three aspirations. ELYSIUM (10) is better than the past couple suggest and can bounce back without surprising. GYPSY WISH (7) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
